scope.selection_note: Codex-only post-ingest identity cleanup prep for ROUTE and CORRIDOR duplicate_global_identity rows only. Inputs were current data/canonical/routes.jsonl, data/canonical/corridors.jsonl, data/identity-overrides/merges.json, data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json, and allowed in-process validateRepo duplicate_global_identity output.
scope.write_limit: Only this review note was written. No identity overrides, LOG.md, manifest, canonical JSONL, DB, wiki, submissions, or other files were edited.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: Global route records route_q52-ltd-woodhaven-2014 and route_q52-sbs-queens share identity key route_q52.
validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: Global route records route_q52-ltd-woodhaven-2014 and route_q52-sbs-queens share identity key route_q52-sbs.

description: Existing limited-stop bus route on Woodhaven/Cross Bay corridor, proposed for conversion to Select Bus Service
Limited-stop bus route along Woodhaven/Cross Bay corridor that would be replaced by Select Bus Service.
Part of the Q52/53 Limited bus route that is the basis for the Woodhaven/Cross Bay SBS corridor. Q52 Extension planned for 2017. Q52/53 SBS launch in Fall 2017.
Proposed SBS service replacing Q52 LTD along Woodhaven/Cross Bay corridor; extension under consideration
Select Bus Service on Woodhaven / Cross Bay corridor, based on existing Q52 LTD route

source_evidence.quote: Based on the existing Q52/53 LTD bus route
Converted to SBS on November 12 th , 2017
82% to 87% of respondents believe the SBS is better than the Q52/Q53 Limited service it replaced.

proposed_aliases.reason: The Q52 LTD record is the pre-launch/limited-stop identity for the same Q52 service that became Q52 SBS on the Woodhaven/Cross Bay corridor. This is included despite being a route-variant-looking collision because the canonical descriptions and source blocks explicitly state conversion/replacement from Q52/Q53 Limited to Q52/Q53 SBS.

guards.route_variant_guard: accepted because source evidence explicitly states Q52/Q53 Limited was converted/replaced by Q52/Q53 SBS

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: Global route records route_m14-ad-sbs and route_m14-brt-phase2 share identity key route_m14.

alias.note: Existing bus route on 14th Street; carries 39,000 trips a day

description: Select Bus Service routes on 14th Street, part of the TTP Pilot Project. M14 A/D SBS services started in July 2019.
Select Bus Service on 14th Street, operated by NYCT; began July 1, 2019; serves approximately 28,000 daily riders
M14 A/D SBS services started in July 2019. Operates on 14th Street between 3rd Avenue and 8th Avenue (TTP corridor).

source_evidence.quote: Existing M14 bus route carries a 39,000 trips a day
M14A/D Select Bus Service, which began on July 1, 2019
Coinciding with the launch of Select Bus Service for the M14A and M14D buses

proposed_aliases.reason: The alias record is the earlier BRT Phase II M14/14th Street route identity, while the target is the implemented M14A/D SBS route identity on the same 14th Street service. This is included under the route-variant guard because the target/source evidence explicitly describes the M14A/D Select Bus Service launch for the M14 buses rather than merely sharing a route number.

guards.route_variant_guard: accepted because source evidence explicitly ties the existing M14 route to the launch of M14A/D Select Bus Service

proposal_guards: Each proposed alias_id and target_id exists in current canonical JSONL.
No proposed alias_id is already present as a merge alias in current data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
No proposed alias_id is currently a merge target in current data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
No proposed target_id is currently a merge alias in current data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
No proposed pair appears in current data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json.
No stale ids, alias==target pairs, unproven route variants, compound-route traps, or ambiguous same-street-only corridor collisions were included.
excluded_current_duplicate_classes: Excluded corridor rows where the only guard-safe direction would collapse a richer current corridor into a broad BRT Phase II candidate target, including 125th Street, 14th Street, Webster/Third Avenue, and Utica Avenue Phase II target cases.

Excluded Broadway, Church Avenue, Cross Bay Boulevard, Flatlands Avenue, Kings Highway, Lexington Avenue, Montauk Branch, Third Avenue, Woodhaven Boulevard, and Cropsey/Bay Parkway rows because current evidence shows adjacent limits, partial overlap, borough/scope differences, or one segment of a larger corridor rather than source-backed same corridor identity.

Excluded B44, B46, B82, B103, Bx40/Bx42, Bx55, M23, Q53, and remaining Q52 route rows where local/limited/SBS/express variants, compound routes, or retained local service made the route identity unsafe for this conservative batch.
Excluded possible broad BRT Phase II route aliases when the candidate was only a base route number and source evidence did not prove the whole base route should collapse into an SBS variant.

command_evidence.command: bun --eval 'import { validateRepo } from "./packages/pipeline/src/validate.ts"; ... print duplicate_global_identity route/corridor issues'
command_evidence.purpose: Read-only local validateRepo inspection; observed 519 duplicate_global_identity issues total and 53 route/corridor duplicate_global_identity messages without running the forbidden validate CLI.

command_evidence.command: bun --eval '<read current route/corridor canonical JSONL, current merges, current do-not-merge, and validateRepo issues; print guard-safe directions>'
command_evidence.purpose: Checked stale ids, existing aliases, aliases that are merge targets, targets that are aliases, alias==target, and do-not-merge hits before selecting proposals.
Inspected canonical payloads, record_aliases, source_ids, merged field values, and evidence refs for selected and excluded route/corridor candidates.
Read local source blocks for selected lifecycle evidence quotes without running provider-backed commands.

blockers: A read-only validateRepo rerun briefly hit a transient SQLite busy lock in the shared workspace; a later retry succeeded and no data was written by the failed read-only command.
No high-confidence corridor alias survived the requested guards; remaining corridor rows are mostly partial-overlap, adjacent-segment, broad-candidate-target, or same-street-only collisions.
